topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Migrate OpenAiService.classify() to OpenAI Structured Outputs with JSON Schema category enum derived from Firefly category list; invalid/hallucinated categories blocked by schema; US-0001 regression tests pass; OPENAI_MODEL env preserved; rate-limit backoff retained.

src/OpenAiService.js (classify, #generatePrompt, SDK client init), package.json openai dependency (v3.2.1 to v4+), tests/resolveCategory.test.js and new OpenAiService unit tests, src/App.js #retryWithBackoff caller contract unchanged.

Scope limited to classify() only — matchAccount and extractTransactionsFromText stay on legacy prompt+parse until follow-up. US-0001 DONE unblocks DEC-0003. SDK v3 to v4 breaking API change. gpt-4o-mini default; Structured Outputs requires gpt-4o-mini+ snapshots. No fine-tuning, no multi-provider LLM. Zod optional — manual json_schema acceptable to avoid new deps.
topic_coverage.delegation_scope: docs/product/backlog.md US-0003, decisions/DEC-0003.md, docs/engineering/research.md R-0002, handoffs/resume_brief.md
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Product backfill (2026-06-12) and DEC-0003 defer-until-harness criteria established US-0003 scope; US-0001/S0003 release unblocks migration; drain-advance confirms constraints unchanged.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: AC-1: classify uses Structured Outputs with category enum from Firefly list. AC-2: schema blocks invalid category names. AC-3: webhook/bulk/test-webhook paths pass US-0001 regression (4/4). AC-4: OPENAI_MODEL env selects model; default gpt-4o-mini. AC-5: #retryWithBackoff still applies on 429.

Done when all US-0003 AC-1 through AC-5 pass: bash tests/run-tests.sh exits 0, classify returns only enum-valid categories or null/UNKNOWN mapping, no happy-path regression in #resolveCategory precedence tests, model env and backoff behavior verified.

decomposition.rationale: US-0003 remains a single ai-reliability vertical slice — SDK upgrade, schema-locked classify(), and US-0001 regression coverage ship together; classify() return contract must stay stable for App.js callers.
decomposition.alternative_considered: Split SDK upgrade vs classify migration — rejected; technical-layer split risks partial deploy with broken v3/v4 client init and incomplete regression signal.
